use_cases: Download iOS app from a company website or landing page
Call-to-action button for mobile app promotion
Link to App Store from e-commerce product pages
App store download link for SaaS platforms with mobile apps
Mobile app download button for media and content platforms
ai_summary: A minimalist atomic button component styled like the Apple App Store download button, featuring an integrated Apple icon with formatted text showing 'Download on the App Store'. Designed as a call-to-action element for websites promoting iOS mobile applications, commonly used on landing pages, product pages, and SaaS platforms.
